mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_message ( session_id, role, content, images, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{images}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, session_id as sessionId, role, content, images, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from ai_chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} and is_deleted = 0 order by id asc

select id, session_id as sessionId, role, content, images, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from ( select id, session_id, role, content, images, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from ai_chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} and is_deleted = 0 order by id desc limit #{limit} ) t order by t.id asc
